channel.title: Reversing on cha0s.re
channel.description: Recent content in Reversing on cha0s.re

item.title: lde — a length disassembler in 400 lines
item.description: A single-header x86-64 length disassembler, written because every hooking library needs one and none of them agree.

item.title: Hooking the Windows loader
item.description: Walking LDR_DATA_TABLE_ENTRY by hand, then patching the one function that everybody hooks and nobody documents.

item.title: Strings are a map of the binary
item.description: Before opening the graph view, read the string table. It tells you what the program thinks it is.
